title: Upon One Lily, Who Married With A Maid Called Rose.
content:
What times of sweetness this fair day foreshows,
    Whenas the Lily marries with the Rose!
    What next is look'd for? but we all should see
    To spring from thee a sweet posterity.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Upon One Lily, Who Married With A Maid Called Rose."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
